# kemp_virtual_service_rule (Data Source)

Checks whether a system rule is attached to a virtual service in a given direction. Errors if the attachment does not exist.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "kemp_virtual_service_rule" "existing" {
  virtual_service_id = "12"
  direction          = "request"
  rule               = "match-api-path"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `direction` (String) Direction: `request`, `response`, `responsebody`, or `pre`.
- `rule` (String) Name of the rule to look up.
- `virtual_service_id` (String) Index of the virtual service.
